hero.title: Transform Your Body and Mind
hero.subtitle: Professional pilates training in an intimate setting. A personalized approach for everyone.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyUs.card1Desc: Our certified instructors have years of experience and are dedicated to your progress.
whyUs.card2Desc: Maximum 7 people per group training guarantees individual attention.
whyUs.card3Desc: Every program is tailored to your needs, goals, and physical condition.
whyUs.card4Desc: Choose time slots that work for you, from noon to evening hours.

about.title: About Us
about.text: Our studio was founded with a clear vision — to create a space where everyone feels welcome, supported, and motivated. With an expert team and modern equipment, we provide a pilates experience that transforms. We believe pilates is more than exercise — it's a path to a balanced life.

classes.title: Available Classes
classes.groupDesc: Dynamic atmosphere with up to 7 people. Ideal for motivation and social exercise with professional guidance.
classes.duoDesc: Train with a partner or friend. Semi-individual approach with maximum attention.
classes.individualDesc: Fully tailored to your needs. One-on-one with a trainer for the fastest results.

ctaSection.title: Ready for a Change?
ctaSection.subtitle: Contact us today and start your pilates journey towards health and better confidence.

packages.title: Our Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose the package that suits you best. All packages include access to expert trainers and modern equipment.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question or want to book a training? Get in touch!
